de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class AbstractExecutionMethodReturn<S extends SourceElement>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<S>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionMethodReturn<S>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<S>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn, ExecutionMethodReturn

    public abstract class AbstractExecutionMethodReturn<S extends SourceElement>
extends AbstractExecutionNode<S>
implements IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S>
    The default implementation of IExecutionBaseMethodReturn.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private IExecutionVariable[] callStateVariables
      The variable value pairs of the state when the method has been called.
      private String formatedMethodReturnCondition
      The human readable method return condition to reach this node from its calling IExecutionMethodCall.
      private ExecutionMethodCall methodCall
      The IExecutionMethodCall which is now returned.
      private Term methodReturnCondition
      The method return condition to reach this node from its calling IExecutionMethodCall.
      private String signature
      The signature.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Returns the variable value pairs of the state when the method has been called.

      Returns the human readable condition under which this method return is reached from the calling IExecutionMethodCall.

      A reference to the IExecutionMethodCall which is now returned.

      Returns the condition under which this method return is reached from the calling IExecutionMethodCall.
      String getSignature()
      Returns a human readable signature which describes this element.
      protected IExecutionVariable[] lazyComputeCallStateVariables()
      Computes the variables lazily when getCallStateVariables() is called the first time.
      protected void lazyComputeMethodReturnCondition()
      Computes the method return condition lazily when getMethodReturnCondition() or getFormatedMethodReturnCondition() is called the first time.
      protected abstract String lazyComputeSignature()
      Computes the signature lazily when getSignature() is called the first time.

        settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
        proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
